---
title: "Data Cleaning"
author: "Sijda Ahmed"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load in libraries
```{r}
library(rmarkdown)
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Load in datasets
```{r}
demographics_data <- read_xpt("DEMO_J.xpt")
rh_data <- read_xpt("RHQ_J.xpt")
pthalates_data <- read_xpt("PHTHTE_J.xpt")
```

# Data cleaning
```{r}
# demographics
demographics_data<- demographics_data |>
select(SEQN, RIAGENDR, RIDAGEYR, RIDRETH1)

# reproductive health
rh_data<- rh_data |>
  select(SEQN, RHQ010, RHQ031, RHQ060, RHQ076)

# pthalates
pthalates_data<- pthalates_data |>
select(SEQN, URXCNP, URXMHH)

alldata <- demographics_data %>%
  full_join(rh_data, by="SEQN") %>%
  full_join(pthalates_data, by="SEQN") 
alldata <- na.omit(alldata)
colnames(alldata) <- c("SEQN", "Gender", "Age", "Race", "Age_FirstPeriod", "RegularPeriod_12m", "Age_LastPeriod", "Pregnancy_Ability", "MEHP")
summary(alldata)

```
